backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types and persistent state for user profiles, quotations, projects, reviews, chat messages, and admin users, along with shared functions for messaging and other operations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from an older schema to a newer one by adding a nullable `contactInfo` field while preserving all existing data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (Contact Us page, admin gallery upload, and Services page update) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used for build planning and documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Nellore Print Hub React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes, including customer-facing pages, admin pages, and the new `/contact` route for the ContactUsPage.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: A route guard component that restricts access to admin-only pages, showing loading states, first-admin registration prompts, access denied messages, or redirecting unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile with links to Home, Services, Gallery, Reviews, Contact, and Chat, locking restricted items behind authentication with haptic feedback and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A reusable mobile bottom sheet modal component with backdrop, slide-up animation, optional title, close button, and scrollable content area.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A mobile-friendly select input that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, displaying a checkmark on the selected item and triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A full-screen chat widget that requires Internet Identity authentication, collects user name/email, sends messages via a mutation hook, and displays a local chat history with scroll-to-bottom behavior.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with logo and login button, bottom navigation for customer pages, an admin login shortcut bar, a full-screen chat modal, and a responsive footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout and showing a loading spinner during the login process.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct bubble styles and avatars for each sender.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog component that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and mobile number, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: Wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during the pull and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: Renders animated skeleton placeholder cards in four variants (project, review, quotation, service) to display while content is loading.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: Wrapper component that attaches swipe gesture handlers to enable horizontal swipe navigation, applying a subtle translateX offset during the swipe.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Hook providing a mutation that hashes a password with SHA-256 and verifies an email/password pair against the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: Hook that queries the backend admin user count to determine whether any admin account has been registered.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Hooks for fetching the list of admin invitations and sending a new admin invitation with a hashed password via backend mutations.
Hook providing a mutation to register the first admin user, invalidating and refetching admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Hooks for WebAuthn-based biometric login and registration, checking device support and interacting with the backend to register biometric credentials.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Hooks for sending customer messages, fetching all chat messages, posting owner replies, and retrieving a specific customer's chat history via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Hooks for fetching and updating the company logo stored in the backend, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Hooks for fetching and updating contact information (email, phone, location) from the backend, with a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Hook providing a mutation to calculate a delivery fee based on a given distance by calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Exports a mutation hook for responding to a quotation negotiation via the actor, invalidating quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides query and mutation hooks for fetching and updating the office location via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Exports hooks for querying all projects or by category, and mutations for adding, editing, and deleting projects via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook that tracks touch events, pull distance, and triggers a refresh callback when the pull threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a mutation hook for uploading a quotation file as a blob and a query hook for retrieving a quotation's file blob by quotation ID.
Exports a mutation hook for handling a quotation response (status update with optional message) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Exports hooks for querying all or user-specific quotations and mutations for creating, adding details to, and approving quotations via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a query hook that fetches quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating counts) with 30-second polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides query hooks for fetching all reviews or filtered by rating, and a mutation hook for adding a new review via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Implements horizontal swipe gesture navigation between a predefined set of routes using TanStack Router, tracking touch events and navigating on threshold-exceeding swipes.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides a query hook for fetching the current caller's user profile and a mutation hook for saving it via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color values, plus utility classes for shimmer animations, safe-area padding, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class with a frontend-friendly TypeScript class that supports getting bytes, direct URLs, upload progress callbacks, and static factory methods for creating blobs from URLs or byte arrays.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for Nellore Print Hub displaying a hero section, a benefits grid with icons, and a commitment/values section using Card components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin-only dashboard page that displays quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating) as stat cards using data from useQuotationStatistics, protected by AdminGuard.
Admin login page supporting email/password, WebAuthn biometric, and Internet Identity authentication methods, with first-admin registration flow and automatic redirect to the dashboard on successful auth.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: A registration page for creating new admin accounts with email/password form validation, password strength checks, and redirect to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: An admin page for managing admin users, displaying a table of existing admins and providing a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: An admin page that displays all customer chat messages grouped by email, allowing admins to expand conversations and send replies to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: An admin page for uploading and managing the company logo, showing the current logo and allowing file selection with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: An admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, supporting image uploads, category selection, and an edit/add dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for managing quotation requests, allowing admins to add pricing details, approve quotations, respond to negotiations, and upload quotation files with validation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Contact page that fetches contact info via a custom hook and displays email, phone, and location cards with action buttons, supporting pull-to-refresh and swipe gestures.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Delivery information page that shows service area details and provides an interactive fee calculator where users enter a distance in km to get a computed delivery cost from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section, a four-feature grid, and navigation buttons to the quote request and gallery pages, wrapped in pull-to-refresh and swipe containers.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of the authenticated user's quotation requests with status badges, deadline info, and a PDF download button for each quotation.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Shows a filterable gallery of completed projects by service category, and allows admin users to upload new projects with an image, title, description, and category via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Static confirmation page shown after a quotation request is submitted, displaying the request ID and a step-by-step explanation of the review and notification process.
Form page that lets users submit a new quotation request by selecting a service type, deadline, project details, mobile number, and email, then navigates to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Allows authenticated users to view their pending quotations and respond by accepting, rejecting, or initiating a negotiation with a message, and supports downloading the quotation PDF.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays a services page listing four printing/design offerings (Digital, Flex/Banner, Offset, Creative Design) with descriptions, features, and CTA buttons, wrapped in pull-to-refresh and swipe containers.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Provides a form for customers to submit a review including name, rating, project type, text, and optional image upload with progress tracking, then saves it via the useAddReview hook.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Shows customer reviews fetched from the backend with star-rating filters; requires Internet Identity authentication and displays a login prompt if the user is unauthenticated.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module wrapping the browser Vibration API to provide tap, success, error, and selection haptic feedback patterns.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn helper functions for checking platform authenticator support, registering and authenticating credentials, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64 formats.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-queries/animate plugins, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Nellore Print Hub tracking existing features (Contact Us page, Gallery admin upload, Services page update) and a pending backend task to expose manageable contact details via an API endpoint.
